title: CBB Rulebook Volume 5 Crowdfunding Platform Operators Module
summary: Requires crowdfunding platform operators to be authorised by the CBB and comply with platform governance, disclosure, risk, client money, AML, technology and conduct obligations for digitally delivered finance platforms.

theme_notes.digital_economy.online_platforms: Regulates loan-based and equity-based crowdfunding platforms.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Regulatory Sandbox Framework and Digital Finance rules
